title: senecio langei
intro: Senecio langei, also known as Lange's ragwort or woolly groundsel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family and is native to the western United States. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used in traditional medicine for their anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The medicinal properties of Senecio langei have been reported to exhibit health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Senecio langei is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
